topic: Valkey GLIDE - Official Multi-Language Client for Valkey

sources.title: Valkey GLIDE - Official Documentation
sources.description: Main documentation site for Valkey GLIDE with quickstart guides, tutorials, API reference, and migration guides.

sources.title: Welcome to Valkey GLIDE - Overview
sources.description: Overview page covering architecture, supported languages, features (AZ Affinity, PubSub, batching, OpenTelemetry), and engine compatibility.

sources.title: Valkey GLIDE GitHub Repository
sources.description: Main repository containing Rust core, Java, Python, Node.js, and Go wrappers. Includes README with version support matrix and feature list.

sources.title: Quick Start Guide
sources.description: Installation and basic connection examples for all six supported languages: Python, Java, Node.js, Go, PHP, C#.

sources.title: Announcing Valkey GLIDE 2.0 - AWS Blog
sources.description: GLIDE 2.0 announcement covering Go support, OpenTelemetry integration, batching API, and performance benchmarks.

sources.title: Introducing Valkey GLIDE - AWS Blog
sources.description: Original GLIDE introduction covering Rust core architecture, language bindings, connection management, and design philosophy.

sources.title: General Concepts - GLIDE Wiki
sources.description: Core concepts: multiplexed connections, lazy connections, multi-slot commands, inflight request management, batching, PubSub, cluster scan, OpenTelemetry.

sources.title: Client Comparison
sources.description: Feature-by-feature comparison of GLIDE vs Jedis, redis-py, node_redis, go-redis, and StackExchange.Redis.

sources.title: Valkey Client Libraries
sources.description: Official Valkey client library listing showing GLIDE alongside other community clients.

sources.title: Migration Guide: Jedis to GLIDE
sources.description: Comprehensive side-by-side code examples for migrating from Jedis to GLIDE: connections, strings, hashes, lists, sets, sorted sets, transactions, Lua scripts.

sources.title: Migration Guide: ioredis to GLIDE
sources.description: Complete migration guide from ioredis to GLIDE Node.js client with code comparisons for all data types and operations.

sources.title: Migration Guide: redis-py to GLIDE
sources.description: Complete migration guide from redis-py to GLIDE Python client with API differences, parameter mapping, and code examples.

sources.title: Migration Guide: go-redis to GLIDE
sources.description: Complete migration guide from go-redis to GLIDE Go client covering configuration mapping, result types, error handling, and batch operations.

sources.title: Python Wrapper Wiki
sources.description: Python async wrapper documentation with cluster/standalone configuration, batch operations, read strategies, and advanced features.

sources.title: Python Sync Wrapper Wiki
sources.description: Python synchronous API (v2.1+) documentation with limitations, batch operations, retry strategies, and read configuration.

sources.title: Go Wrapper Wiki
sources.description: Go wrapper architecture, CGO bridge, batch API, read strategies, TLS, OpenTelemetry, error handling, and performance considerations.

sources.title: Node.js Wrapper Wiki
sources.description: Node.js client documentation including TypeScript support, ESM/CJS compatibility, and napi-rs architecture.

sources.title: Java Wrapper Wiki
sources.description: Java client documentation including JNI/Protobuf communication, CompletableFuture API, and configuration patterns.

sources.title: Introducing the Valkey Glide Go Client - Blog
sources.description: Go client architecture deep-dive: CGO bridge, multiplexed connections, consensus-based topology, synchronous API design, read strategies.

sources.title: AZ Affinity Strategy - Blog
sources.description: Detailed AZ Affinity coverage: strategy types, configuration in Python/Java/Node.js, latency reduction (~500us), cost savings examples.

sources.title: AWS Reduces Latency with AZ Affinity - InfoQ
sources.description: Third-party coverage of AZ Affinity routing feature, cost analysis, and technical requirements.

sources.title: Pub/Sub Basics Tutorial
sources.description: Pub/Sub tutorial covering subscription modes, message reception methods, dynamic subscriptions (v2.3+), and automatic reconnection.

sources.title: Pub/Sub and Streaming - DeepWiki
sources.description: Comprehensive Pub/Sub architecture: exact/pattern/sharded modes, Streams API, consumer groups, cluster routing, transaction compatibility.

sources.title: OpenTelemetry Configuration - Java
sources.description: Java-specific OpenTelemetry setup including collector configuration, sampling, and span structure.

sources.title: Setting up TLS Tutorial
sources.description: TLS configuration tutorial: basic TLS, custom certificates, binary mode certificate reading, hostname verification.

sources.title: Timeouts and Reconnect Strategy - Go
sources.description: Go-specific timeout configuration and exponential backoff reconnection strategy documentation.

sources.title: Best Practices: Valkey Clients - AWS Blog
sources.description: AWS best practices for Valkey clients including timeout configuration, reconnection, and connection handling.

sources.title: Python API Documentation - Standalone
sources.description: Python GlideClient API reference for standalone mode operations.

sources.title: Python API Documentation - Cluster
sources.description: Python GlideClusterClient API reference for cluster mode operations.

sources.title: Python Configuration API
sources.description: Python configuration classes: GlideClientConfiguration, GlideClusterClientConfiguration, NodeAddress, ServerCredentials, BackoffStrategy.

sources.title: Redis vs ioredis vs valkey-glide Benchmark
sources.description: Detailed performance comparison: throughput for SET/GET/HSET/HGET, batched operations, concurrent performance. GLIDE ~15-20% slower for sequential, competitive for batched.

sources.title: valkey-glide on PyPI
sources.description: PyPI package page with installation instructions and version history.

sources.title: @valkey/valkey-glide on npm
sources.description: npm package page with installation and supported Node.js versions.

sources.title: Go Package Documentation
sources.description: Go package documentation on pkg.go.dev with API reference.

sources.title: Valkey GLIDE Releases
sources.description: Complete release history from v1.0 through v2.3.0 with changelogs and feature additions per version.

sources.title: Jedis Compatibility Layer
sources.description: Drop-in Jedis-compatible wrapper backed by GLIDE for zero-code-change migration.

sources.title: Valkey GLIDE C# Repository
sources.description: C# client (preview) separate repository with .NET 8.0+ support, async/await patterns.

sources.title: Valkey GLIDE PHP Repository
sources.description: PHP client (preview) separate repository with PHPRedis API compatibility.

sources.title: Spring Data Valkey
sources.description: Spring Boot starter for Valkey with GLIDE, Lettuce, and Jedis driver support. Auto-configuration, Actuator health, OpenTelemetry.

sources.title: Commands and Data Types - DeepWiki
sources.description: Comprehensive command coverage across all data types: strings, hashes, lists, sets, sorted sets, streams, bitmaps, geo, hyperloglog.
